UltimateStrikerPaytable.PayoutDesc1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.PayoutDesc2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.PayoutDesc3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.BetWaysDesc1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.BetWaysDesc2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbols from the leftmost reel to the right.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.BetWaysDesc3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.BetWaysDesc4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
UltimateStrikerPaytable.BetWaysDesc5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

UltimateStrikerRule.Rule1: Ultimate Striker is a 6-reel, 6-row video slot featuring sticky Wilds-on-the-Way and free spins that increase all multipliers.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{576} ways - %{46656} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

UltimateStrikerRule.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
UltimateStrikerRule.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
UltimateStrikerRule.SymbolRules1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
UltimateStrikerRule.SymbolRules2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
UltimateStrikerRule.SymbolRules3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
UltimateStrikerRule.SymbolRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

UltimateStrikerShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
UltimateStrikerShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
UltimateStrikerShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
UltimateStrikerShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc4: The number indicated at the top portion of the Wild symbol represents the number of the times the Wild symbol can be used in a winning combination before it destroys itself.
UltimateStrikerShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc5: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 2 or more, the Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and that value is deducted by 1.
UltimateStrikerShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc6: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 1, the Wild symbol will destroy itself in the next round.
UltimateStrikerShared.MultiplierReelDesc1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown below the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
UltimateStrikerShared.MultiplierReelDesc2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
UltimateStrikerShared.MultiplierReelDesc3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
UltimateStrikerShared.MultiplierReelDesc4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
UltimateStrikerShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
UltimateStrikerShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers below the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.
UltimateStrikerShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: If there are one or more winning combinations on the reels, the multipliers below the reels will be increased by 1, 2, 3 and 5 respectively in the next free spin.
UltimateStrikerShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{8000}x of the bet amount.
UltimateStrikerShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{8000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
